messages.content: The Savage 2.0 is priced at $2,199.99. If you're looking for the 20Ah battery upgrade, it is available for an additional cost. Would you like more information on the battery options or to place an order?
When you put in cart appears to be more

I recommend checking the website for any current promotions or sales that might affect the price. If the price in the cart is higher than $2,199.99, it could be due to additional options or shipping fees. You can also call us at (952) 283-0777 for assistance with your order and to clarify any pricing discrepancies.
